title: Bookkeeping Smoke Test Marker
pipeline_rationale: This is a deterministic markdown marker-file creation with no source code, tests, schema, or runtime behavior changes. The bookkeeping path is sufficient because execution, validation, and closeout documentation can prove the exact file content and ledger synchronization.

skipped_stages.2: Skipped because the plan is tiny, deterministic, user-specified, and low-risk.
skipped_stages.3: Skipped because no conditional re-review is needed unless Stage 2 runs and requests changes.
skipped_stages.4: Skipped because TDD test writing does not apply to a bookkeeping-only markdown marker file.
skipped_stages.4b: Skipped because RED-gate validation requires generated tests, and Stage 4 is intentionally skipped.
skipped_stages.6: Skipped because test_framework is none and test_command is n/a for this bookkeeping track.
skipped_stages.8: Skipped unless Stage 7 finds a validation issue requiring conditional re-validation.

summary: Create a Conductor bookkeeping smoke-test marker markdown file with exact requested content and synchronize closeout artifacts.
keyOutcomes: Exact marker file content is created and verified.
Conductor ledgers and metadata are synchronized during execution closeout.
Bookkeeping pipeline path skips non-applicable TDD/test stages.
risks: Exact content comparison can fail due to newline differences.
Ledger upsert can create duplicates if not checked first.
Native file tools are unavailable in this host session.
validationCriteria: Marker file exact-content comparison returns True.
tracks.md contains exactly one completed row for the track.
tracks-ledger.md contains exactly one completed row for the track.
